title: The Emperor of Small Hours
provenance: There's a moment when the scattered parts finally agree to speak to each other again. Not peace, exactly — more like a board meeting where everyone shows up. This is that first morning when you realize you're running things now, not the other way around.
threshold_note: The exact second you stop asking permission from ghosts.
collector_meaning: You're holding the blueprint someone drew at dawn after staying up all night becoming themselves. Some architectures can only be designed by those who've lived in the ruins.
